_comment: Pipeline LLM bindings for environments without CLI access (e.g. Claude Code on the web). Each step invokes evaluation/config/wrappers/file-bus.mjs, which drops a request under evaluation/agent-bus/inbox/<id>/ and blocks until a response appears under evaluation/agent-bus/outbox/<id>.json (or <id>.error.json). The supervising assistant in the session is responsible for watching the inbox, dispatching a subagent per request, and writing the response. See evaluation/README.md § "Running under Claude Code (web)". Copy this file to cli.json to opt in.

generate.description: Drops a generate request on the agent bus. The dispatcher subagent must return Blueprint V2 JSON as a string in { result: "..." }.

judge.description: Drops a judge request on the agent bus. The dispatcher subagent must return the dimension's judge JSON as a string in { result: "..." }.
